acquisition method: The Q Exactive was operated in a data dependent mode
collision energy: HCD fragmentation at a normalized collision energy of 27
enrichment method: MHC-II complexes were purified by immunoaffinity chromatography
fragmentation method: subjected to higher-energy C-trap dissociation (HCD) fragmentation
instrument: coupled online to a Q Exactive mass HF spectrometer
ionization type: coupled online to a Q Exactive mass HF spectrometer via a nanoelectrospray source
